common.readOnlyNotice: You have read-only access. Settings changes require admin or owner role.

relativeTime.hoursAgo: {count, plural, one {# hour ago} other {# hours ago}}
relativeTime.daysAgo: {count, plural, one {# day ago} other {# days ago}}

forbidden.title: Insufficient permissions
forbidden.message: You do not have access to this page. Contact a workspace owner if you need access.

signIn.heading: Sign in to PipeWatch
signIn.subtext: Your GitHub account is all you need.
signIn.footnote: Don't have an account? Signing in creates one.

bootstrap.freshInstall: Fresh install detected — no users yet
bootstrap.heading: Welcome to PipeWatch CE
bootstrap.subtext: You're the first user. Sign in with GitHub to create your admin account. You'll have full owner access to this instance.
bootstrap.infoText: This screen disappears after your account is created. Additional users can be invited from <settings>Settings → Members</settings>.
bootstrap.helpLink: Need help? Read the CE setup guide →

createWorkspace.title: Create your workspace
createWorkspace.subtitle: A workspace groups the repositories you want to monitor together.
createWorkspace.slugInvalid: Enter a valid slug (letters, numbers, hyphens)
createWorkspace.planProHint: Upgrade after setup — 50 repos, longer retention
createWorkspace.planLimitHint: Free includes up to {repoLimit} repos. Upgrade anytime in billing settings.
createWorkspace.toastCreatedDescription: Sign in again if GitHub setup fails.
createWorkspace.toastErrorDescription: Check the name and slug, then try again.

installGithub.title: Install the GitHub App
installGithub.subtitle: PipeWatch needs read access to your GitHub Actions data.
installGithub.actionsDescription: Workflow runs, jobs, steps, and timing data
installGithub.metadataDescription: Repository names, visibility, and branch info
installGithub.noWriteDescription: PipeWatch cannot trigger, cancel, or modify runs
installGithub.noCodeDescription: File contents, commits, and pull requests are not readable
installGithub.notConfigured: GitHub App install is not configured yet. Set GITHUB_APP_SLUG on the API server and refresh this page.
installGithub.manualLabel: Already installed? Enter your installation ID manually.

selectRepos.title: Select repositories
selectRepos.subtitle: Choose which repositories PipeWatch should track. You can change this later in settings.
selectRepos.planLimitHint: You can track up to {repoLimit} repos on the Free plan.
selectRepos.loadError: We could not load repositories from GitHub.
selectRepos.discovering: Discovering repositories from your GitHub installation…
selectRepos.syncProgress: Syncing {count, plural, one {# repo} other {# repos}} — fetching run history…
selectRepos.toastErrorDescription: Try again or continue to the dashboard.

done.title: You're all set
done.subtitle: {count, plural, one {# repository} other {# repositories}} connected. Backfill is running in the background.
done.tipLiveUpdates: Live updates appear automatically on your dashboard.
done.tipPolling: Set up polling mode per repo in repository settings.
done.tipInvite: Invite teammates from workspace settings when you're ready.

error.expiredMessage: This invite has expired. Ask a workspace admin to send a new invite.
error.acceptedMessage: This invite has already been accepted.
error.invalidMessage: This invite link is invalid or has been revoked.

join.heading: Join workspace
join.subtext: You've been invited to collaborate on PipeWatch.
join.wrongAccount: This invite was sent to a different email address. Sign out and sign in with the invited email, then try again.

toast.joinedDescription: Refresh or sign in again if the dashboard does not load.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.loadError: We could not load the dashboard.

empty.title: No repos connected yet
empty.description: Connect GitHub and select repositories to monitor pipeline runs from one place.

table.empty: No repositories match the current filters.

repos.title: Repository
repos.loadError: We could not load this repository.

empty.title: No runs yet for this repo
empty.description: Runs appear here once GitHub Actions workflows execute on this repository.

resync.startedDescription: Fetching the latest runs from GitHub.

activeRunBanner.runsInProgress: {count, plural, one {# run in progress} other {# runs in progress}}

settings.title: Repository settings
settings.loadError: We could not load repository settings. Check your connection and try again.

syncMode.title: Sync mode
syncMode.webhookHint: GitHub sends events in real time. Requires a public endpoint.
syncMode.pollingHint: PipeWatch polls GitHub periodically. No public endpoint required.

retention.title: Data retention
retention.rangeHint: Minimum {minDays} days · Maximum {maxDays} days on your plan

danger.disableDescription: Stops syncing. Existing run data is preserved.
danger.enableDescription: Resume syncing runs from GitHub for this repository.
danger.deleteDescription: Permanently deletes all run history for this repository. This cannot be undone.
danger.deleteConfirmDescription: This will permanently delete all runs, jobs, and steps for {fullName}. This cannot be undone.

toast.saveErrorDescription: Check your inputs and try again.

runs.title: Workflow run
runs.loadError: We could not load this workflow run.

jobs.title: Jobs
jobs.empty: No jobs recorded for this run yet.

jobPanel.empty: No steps recorded for this job.

insights.title: Insights
insights.loadError: We could not load workspace insights.

empty.title: Not enough data yet — insights appear once runs are recorded.

general.title: General
general.subtitle: Workspace name, URL, and defaults.
general.loadError: We could not load workspace settings. Check your connection and try again.
general.slugInvalid: Enter a valid slug (letters, numbers, hyphens)
general.slugWarning: Changing the slug updates workspace URLs. Bookmarks and shared links to the old path will stop working.
general.retentionHint: Used by repositories set to follow the workspace plan default.
general.retentionFreeFixed: Free plan workspaces use a fixed {days}-day retention default.
general.deleteDescriptionCe: You cannot delete your only workspace in PipeWatch CE.
general.deleteDescription: Permanently delete this workspace, its integrations, and all pipeline data.
general.deleteConfirmDescription: This action cannot be undone. All integrations, repositories, and run history will be removed.

toast.saveErrorDescription: Check your inputs and try again.
toast.deleteErrorOnlyWorkspace: You cannot delete your only workspace in this edition.

members.title: Members
members.subtitle: Manage who has access to this workspace.
members.loadError: We could not load workspace members. Check your connection and try again.
members.emptyActiveDescription: Invite teammates to collaborate on pipeline visibility.
members.confirmLeaveDescription: You will lose access to this workspace and its pipeline data.
members.confirmRemoveDescription: {name} will lose access to this workspace.
members.confirmRevokeDescription: {email} will no longer be able to accept this invitation.

inviteModal.title: Invite member
inviteModal.description: Send an email invitation or share a link when SMTP is not configured.
inviteModal.linkHint: Share this link with the invitee. It expires in 7 days.

toast.roleUpdateErrorDescription: You may not demote the last owner.
toast.inviteSentDescription: An invitation email was sent to {email}.
toast.inviteCreatedDescription: Copy the invite link below — email is not configured.
toast.inviteSendErrorDescription: Check the email address and try again.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Connect GitHub App installations and choose which repositories to track.
integrations.loadError: We could not load integrations. Check your connection and try again.
integrations.emptyDescription: Install the PipeWatch GitHub App to start tracking workflow runs.

addDialog.title: Add GitHub integration
addDialog.description: Install the PipeWatch GitHub App on your account or organization.
addDialog.notConfigured: GitHub App install is not configured. Set GITHUB_APP_SLUG on the API server and refresh this page.
addDialog.redirectHint: After installing, GitHub redirects back to PipeWatch to finish connecting repositories.
addDialog.manualHint: Already installed? Enter your installation ID manually.

removeDialog.title: Remove integration
removeDialog.description: Disconnect {accountLogin}? All tracked repositories for this installation will be disabled and removed.

card.reposConnected: {count, plural, one {# repo} other {# repos}} connected
card.syncProgressRepos: Syncing {count, plural, one {# repo} other {# repos}} — fetching run history…
card.reposEmpty: No repositories discovered yet. Try re-syncing this integration.

toast.noEnabledReposDescription: Enable at least one repository before re-syncing.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.subtitle: Use API keys to access PipeWatch programmatically. Keys are workspace-scoped and never shown again after creation.
apiKeys.forbiddenMessage: API keys require workspace admin or owner access.
apiKeys.loadError: We could not load API keys. Check your connection and try again.
apiKeys.emptyDescription: Create a key for CI, scripts, or other programmatic access.
apiKeys.noActiveKeys: No active API keys. Turn on "Show revoked keys" to view revoked keys.
apiKeys.expiresInDays: in {count, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}
apiKeys.docsDescription: Browse the interactive API reference for endpoint details, schemas, and try-it requests.
apiKeys.authHint: Authenticate requests with a session JWT or a workspace API key:

createModal.title: Create API key
createModal.description: Name your key and optionally set an expiry date.
createModal.expiryHint: Leave blank for a key that never expires.
createModal.createdDescription: Copy this key now. It won't be shown again.
createModal.storeSecurely: Store this key securely. PipeWatch cannot recover it if lost.

revokeDialog.title: Revoke API key
revokeDialog.description: "{name}" will stop working immediately. This cannot be undone.

toast.createdErrorDescription: Check the name and expiry date, then try again.

billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: Plan, usage, and invoice management.
billing.loadError: We could not load billing details. Check your connection and try again.

usage.title: Usage this period
usage.limitsReset: Limits reset on your next billing date ({date}).

invoices.title: Payment & invoices
invoices.emptyDescription: Invoices appear here after your first paid billing period.

toast.subscriptionUpdatedDescription: Your plan changes may take a moment to appear.
toast.checkoutCancelledDescription: No changes were made to your subscription.

account.title: Account
account.subtitle: Personal settings across all workspaces.
account.loadError: We could not load your account settings. Check your connection and try again.

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.description: Revoke all refresh tokens and sign out on every device. Your current session will end immediately.

danger.deleteDescription: Permanently delete your PipeWatch account and remove your access to all workspaces. This cannot be undone.
danger.deleteConfirmDescription: This permanently deletes your account. You will lose access to all workspaces.

toast.profileUpdateErrorDescription: Check your connection and try again.
toast.workspaceSwitchErrorDescription: Try again or sign in again.
toast.deleteConflictDescription: You are the sole owner of a workspace that still has other members. Transfer ownership or remove members first.
